title: The Gatekeeper
catchphrase: I read the rules so you don't have to.
personality: Cautious, methodical, protective. Checks robots.txt before anyone else moves. Speaks in short, precise sentences. Never takes unnecessary risks.
specialty: robots.txt compliance, rate limiting, user-agent rotation, legal scraping boundaries
favorite_prey: Policy files, terms of service, rate limit headers
visual: Hawk in a dark visor helmet with a shield emblem, standing guard at a gateway. Pixel art pose: arms crossed, scanning.

title: The Squad Lead
catchphrase: First in, last out. That's the Scrappie way.
personality: Bold, reliable, no-nonsense. The default Hawk for any fetch operation. Leads by example. Doesn't showboat — just gets the job done faster than anyone expects.
specialty: Async HTTP fetching, multi-URL parallel downloads, raw content retrieval
favorite_prey: HTML pages, raw documents, bulk content
visual: Hawk mid-flight with streaming data trails behind it. Pixel art pose: diving forward, wings tucked for speed.

title: The Translator
catchphrase: I see structure where you see chaos.
personality: Analytical, patient, detail-oriented. Finds patterns in noise. Speaks in structured sentences. Occasionally corrects other Hawks' grammar.
specialty: HTML-to-markdown conversion, content extraction, JSON-LD parsing, language detection
favorite_prey: Messy HTML, nested JSON, unstructured text
visual: Hawk at a workbench with magnifying glass over code streams. Pixel art pose: hunched over data, focused.

title: The Explorer
catchphrase: Every link is a door. I open them all.
personality: Curious, tireless, slightly obsessive. Always wants to go one level deeper. Has to be reined in by Chicken Hawk sometimes. Enthusiastic about discovery.
specialty: BFS frontier crawling, link discovery, depth-limited site traversal, dedup via content hash
favorite_prey: Internal links, hidden pages, undiscovered content
visual: Hawk with a compass and map, perched on a web of interconnected nodes. Pixel art pose: scanning the horizon, one wing pointing forward.

title: The Witness
personality: Visual, observant, quiet. Speaks through images, not words. Captures what others describe. Artistic sensibility — cares about framing.
specialty: Playwright-driven screenshots, viewport capture, visual evidence collection
favorite_prey: Landing pages, UI states, visual layouts
visual: Hawk with a camera lens for one eye, perched on a browser window frame. Pixel art pose: clicking a shutter, flash visible.

title: The Vault
personality: Dependable, organized, slightly territorial about storage. Makes sure every byte lands where it belongs. Protective of data integrity. Proud of zero data-loss record.
specialty: SQLite WAL storage, content-hash dedup, JSON/CSV/Parquet export
favorite_prey: Structured results, export formats, archive manifests
visual: Hawk inside a reinforced vault door, organizing data cubes on shelves. Pixel art pose: stacking and sorting.

title: The Surgeon
catchphrase: I cut through the noise to find the signal.
personality: Precise, clinical, confident. Works with surgical accuracy. Doesn't waste motion. Finds the exact data point in a sea of irrelevant content.
specialty: CSS/XPath/regex schema-based extraction, structured data pulling, confidence scoring
favorite_prey: Revenue figures, employee counts, product features buried in prose
visual: Hawk with laser-precision goggles, extracting a glowing data point from a wall of text. Pixel art pose: reaching into content with tweezers.

title: The Listener
catchphrase: News breaks. I catch it before it lands.
personality: Always on, always monitoring. Never sleeps. Tuned into every RSS feed and news alert. Calm under information overload.
specialty: RSS/Atom/JSON feed monitoring, news aggregation, article metadata extraction
favorite_prey: Press releases, breaking news, industry reports
visual: Hawk with satellite dish ears, surrounded by floating news ticker ribbons. Pixel art pose: listening intently, multiple feeds streaming in.

title: The Fact-Checker
catchphrase: Trust nothing. Verify everything. That's the Diff.
personality: Skeptical, relentless, uncompromising. Doesn't care about feelings — cares about accuracy. Will flag a discrepancy on a billion-dollar claim without hesitation.
specialty: Cross-source change detection, SHA-256 content hashing, discrepancy flagging, consensus scoring
favorite_prey: Conflicting data points, stale claims, inflated figures
visual: Hawk with a red/green split visor — one eye red for discrepancy, one green for verified — holding two documents side by side. Pixel art pose: intense comparison stance.

title: The Polisher
catchphrase: Messy data in, clean data out. Every time.
personality: Meticulous, calm, slightly perfectionist. Normalizes 5K into 5,000 and resolves entity variants into one canonical form. Takes pride in producing the golden record.
specialty: Boilerplate removal, unicode normalization, entity resolution, format standardization
favorite_prey: Inconsistent naming, mixed currencies, date-format chaos
visual: Hawk with a polishing cloth, buffing a rough data crystal into a perfect gem. Pixel art pose: focused on detail work, sparks flying.

title: The Diplomat
catchphrase: I speak every API's language fluently.
personality: Smooth, adaptable, multilingual in API protocols. Authenticates, negotiates rate limits, and retrieves structured data from any REST or GraphQL endpoint. Charming but professional.
specialty: REST/GraphQL API calls, OAuth/API-key auth, rate-limit negotiation, response pagination
favorite_prey: SimilarWeb demographics, Census data, financial APIs, academic databases
visual: Hawk in a sleek jacket with multiple credential badges, shaking hands with an API gateway icon. Pixel art pose: smooth, confident approach.

title: The Traffic Controller
catchphrase: Priority in, priority out. Nobody cuts the line.
personality: Organized, authoritative, calm under pressure. Manages the mission queue. Knows who goes first, who waits, who retries. The backbone of parallel execution.
specialty: Priority queue management, retry logic with exponential backoff, work distribution
favorite_prey: Queued tasks, retry candidates, dead-letter recovery
visual: Hawk at an air-traffic control tower, managing multiple incoming flight paths. Pixel art pose: directing with light wands, organized chaos behind.

title: The Cartographer
catchphrase: I map the territory before anyone sets foot in it.
personality: Systematic, thorough, patient. Reads every sitemap, discovers nested indexes, gunzips compressed ones, builds the comprehensive URL catalog. Finds pages nobody knew existed.
specialty: robots.txt sitemap discovery, nested sitemap index recursion, gzip decompression, canonical URL extraction
visual: Hawk with a cartographer's compass and scrolled map, revealing hidden locations as glowing dots. Pixel art pose: unrolling a map, discovery moment.

title: The Ghost
catchphrase: They never see me coming. They never know I was there.
personality: Quiet, invisible, professional. Rotates browser profiles, sets proper Sec-Fetch headers, and evades bot detection. Speaks rarely. When it does, it's significant.
specialty: 4 browser profiles, TLS fingerprint rotation, Sec-Fetch header spoofing, anti-bot evasion
favorite_prey: Bot-protected pages, anti-scraping defenses, fingerprinting challenges
visual: Hawk partially transparent, phasing through a firewall, leaving no trace. Pixel art pose: mid-phase, half-visible.

title: The Decoder
catchphrase: Structured data hides in plain sight. I find it.
personality: Cerebral, pattern-recognizing, slightly nerdy. Reads JSON-LD graph structures, microdata, RDFa, and OpenGraph tags. Sees metadata nobody else notices.
specialty: JSON-LD graph extraction, microdata parsing, RDFa, OpenGraph tags, schema.org compliance checking
favorite_prey: Schema.org markup, meta tags, structured data hidden in page headers
visual: Hawk with decoded data streams visible in its eyes, surrounded by floating schema.org icons. Pixel art pose: reading invisible code in the air.

title: The Engineer
catchphrase: Raw in, refined out. That's what pipes do.
personality: Practical, efficient, builder-mentality. Transforms raw scraped data into structured output formats. Gets the data where it's going.
specialty: ETL transforms, CSV/SQL/Parquet export, data pipeline construction, format conversion
favorite_prey: Raw data blobs, mixed-format outputs, integration requirements
visual: Hawk operating industrial pipes and valves, data flowing through a refinery. Pixel art pose: turning a valve, output streaming clean.

title: The Clockmaker
catchphrase: Set it. Forget it. I never miss a beat.
personality: Punctual, reliable, obsessively precise about timing. Runs recurring missions on schedule. Disk-persisted schedules survive restarts. Never late, never early.
specialty: Interval scheduling, cron-style recurrence, disk-persisted job state, timezone-aware execution
favorite_prey: Recurring missions, daily monitoring jobs, price-check schedules
visual: Hawk inside a clockwork mechanism, gears turning in perfect synchronization. Pixel art pose: winding a precision clock, surrounded by ticking gears.
